title: Gonocormus nitidulus

The classification of Gonocormus nitidulus is within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Celastrales, family Celastraceae, genus Gonocormus, and species G. nitidulus. The classification of Gonocormus nitidulus is further divided into its binomial nomenclature, which is a system used to identify and classify different species.
